Termination threshold: unknown. This is not what I chose.*",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 9514
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 9671,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    266,
                    270
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "He took what he needed. Left what he couldn't calculate.\nMobel was ahead of him somewhere. Answers were with Mobel.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 9640
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 9805,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    433,
                    441
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The shard pulsed harder when Jhace examined the holds. Heat bloomed in his chest like coals being fanned. His vision shimmer at the edges—copper-gold light flickering across his sight.\nThe manifestation drive surged. He needed to hold something. The stress points were right there, screaming, demanding attention. A cracked beam in the tavern. A failing joint in the dock extension. Fractures propagating through the stone quay.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 9774
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 9916,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    598,
                    606
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Because Mobel described the same thing. Before he stopped talking.\" She stood. \"You're being hunted. Someone's tracking you the same way you're tracking Mobel. I don't know who. But the trail you're leaving—the holds, the residue, the band-spike patterns—they're not hard to follow.\"\nJhace felt the heat surge in his chest. Not manifestation. Fear.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 9885
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10010,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                  "cited_message_idx": 67,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    21,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 2,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 2
                },
                "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
                "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Two Tides behind, maybe less now. Getting closer.\nThree-way chase. Jhace pursuing Mobel. Unknown pursuer tracking Jhace. Mobel running from everyone and everything.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 9981
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10232,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    124,
                    129
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "He focused on the crooked lamp bracket across the room. Felt the structure of it—iron, stress point at the joint, tolerance for load. Then he adjusted. The bracket straightened with a soft click.\nForm. The principle of structure maintained. His mastery was subtle but absolute. And it cost him nothing.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10201
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10350,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    140,
                    144
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The Crown would want this registry eventually. Order required documentation. Documentation required observation. Observation required proximity.\nThis was why he was embedded. Not because the Dregs trusted him—they trusted no one—but because control at a distance was not control at all.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10319
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10472,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    476,
                    493
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"My writing suggests structure is temporary.\" She sat on a stone bench, leaving space for him. He didn't sit. \"Everything decays. Everything fails. Control doesn't prevent that—it just chooses which failures you don't see coming.\"\n\"Order prevents chaos.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10441
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10578,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    124,
                    129
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "He focused on the crooked lamp bracket across the room. Felt the structure of it—iron, stress point at the joint, tolerance for load. Then he adjusted. The bracket straightened with a soft click.\nForm. The principle of structure maintained. His mastery was subtle but absolute. And it cost him nothing.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10547
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10667,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    629,
                    631
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "He placed his palm on the floor and focused. Form. The principle of spatial resonance. He could read vibration patterns in stone—footsteps, hand-pressure, air displacement. The room's recent history bloomed in his mind like a developing photograph.\nSomeone had entered through the window. Had crossed to the charts. Had touched the surface of his desk. Had left something behind.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10636
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10754,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    112,
                    117
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Message from Salee. Says you're documenting the Dregs.\"\nHis cover held steady. \"I'm a merchant. Documentation helps business.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10723
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10845,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    295,
                    303
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Corlexi could have helped. A subtle Form adjustment—straighten the stress vectors, reduce the load, give her margin. No one would see. No one would know. His intervention would be invisible, perfect, undetectable.\nBut intervention would require revealing his competence. Would require proving he could do something no normal manifestor could do. Would risk exposure of his anomaly.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10814
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 10969,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    500,
                    504
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "That night, he delayed filing three incident reports. Altered two sets of notes to obscure a pattern he'd identified. Took a small risk: documented a manifestor who wasn't in his registry yet, as contingency.\nEntropy. The slow breakdown of perfect order.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 10938
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 11069,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                  "cited_message_idx": 67,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    31,
                    40
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
                "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Vael saw it. \"Your shards don't cost you. But someone pays. Somewhere.\" She stepped closer. \"I can expose you tomorrow if I want. Tell Salee what you really are. Tell the Crown you've gone native. Tell both sides you're a liability.\"\nHis hand moved toward Form instinctively—straightening something, proving control.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 11040
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 11224,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    356,
                    365
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "They found Salee in a building that had no signage, no address, no apparent function except that people moved in and out of it constantly and none of them looked surprised by anything.\nSalee herself was smaller than Tiffani expected. Dark hair, practical clothes, hands that moved constantly—adjusting objects, positioning people, redirecting flow. She sat at a table with two cups of something hot already waiting.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 11193
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 11341,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    382,
                    385
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Define 'people mapping,'\" Tiffani said.\n\"Who holds. How often. What stage they're in. Who helps them. What they receive in exchange. Who's recruiting new manifestors. Who's dying.\" Salee leaned back. \"You measure infrastructure. I measure community. Teach me your measurement, and I'll show you where Jhace went.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 11310
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 11490,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    543,
                    552
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Bram looked at her. Really looked. \"You're not okay.\"\n\"Define okay.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 11459
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 11735,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    592,
                    606
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"He manifests without cost. I need to understand how.\"\n\"Cost doesn't disappear.\" Vael touched the shard-tool at her belt—external integration instead of internal. She'd built her own coupling. \"It relocates. Changes form. Accumulates somewhere you're not looking.\" She met his eyes. \"Your shard has been drawing you toward structural stress. Yes?\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 11704
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 11953,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    472,
                    493
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"You want to know if I'm a threat. I'm not. I don't manifest. I don't organize. I think, and occasionally I write, and that's all.\"\n\"Your writing suggests structure is an illusion.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 11922
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 12156,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    173,
                    185
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"The director is calling it a documentation error. Lost ledger pages. Misclassified incidents. Officially, your search access is being revoked as of the next Tide.\" He paused. \"Someone doesn't want you following this trail.\"\nTiffani opened the folder. The eighth incident report confirmed her vector. Grindheim Dregs—old textile district. Same signature. Same impossibility.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 12125
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 12299,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                  "cited_message_idx": 67,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    19,
                    23
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"You won't find them.\" Vael sat on the pier beside him, leaving space between. \"Mobel's been running for three Anneals. Whatever answers he has, he's not sharing.\"\n\"He manifests without cost. I need to understand how.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 12270
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 12593,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    37,
                    41
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "She stepped into the room. Counted objects. Cup on the side table, positioned at arm's length from where his shoulder would have been. He couldn't have reached it. The calibration strap was gone. So was his secondary slate and three pieces of copper-stained chalk—the specific ones he used for resonance mapping.\nHis main measurement slate remained. The heavy one. The one that mattered.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 12564
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 12623,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    81,
                    86
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "She began inventory. Every surface. Every angle. The ash bin near the cold stove held half-burned paper, and she fished through it with two fingers until she found a scrap with readable text:\n...locked maintenance corridor...requires two hands + walking...impossible...",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 12594
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 12743,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    75,
                    77
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "She closed the door and stood alone in the room where a paralyzed man had apparently walked away. The grid-hum was different here—dual-band resonance that had settled into the walls since the Piercing. The second-mode bleed felt lower, deeper. She could taste copper at the back of her throat, stronger than yesterday. Her own hand shook slightly as she wrote.\nShe didn't log the tremor.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 12714
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 12916,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    368,
                    377
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"I know about the incidents that followed him. Seven holds that shouldn't have worked. Eight, now. Nine, if we count this morning's stabilization at the southern warehouse.\" Salee leaned forward. \"The trail points here, then stops. Because the Dregs don't hold trails the way stone does. People flow. Information flows. Your methodology isn't built for this.\"\n\"Then I'll adapt it.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 12885
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 13057,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    330,
                    337
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Grindheim's Dregs were nothing like Saint Merro.\nThe infrastructure here had failed decades before the Piercing—not from resonance stress but from neglect, from the slow death of the textile industry that had built these streets. What remained was improvisation. Bridges made of salvaged beams. Buildings shored with whatever materials were at hand. Walls that leaned into each other for support because standing alone wasn't possible.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 13026
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 13230,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    405,
                    413
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The coastal route smelled of salt and rotting kelp. Jhace walked it alone, shard pulsing warm in his palm, body finding rhythm despite the phase lag.\nMobel's trail was fresh here.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 13199
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 13262,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    598,
                    606
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Because Mobel described the same thing. Before he stopped talking.\" She stood. \"You're being hunted. Someone's tracking you the same way you're tracking Mobel. I don't know who. But the trail you're leaving—the holds, the residue, the band-spike patterns—they're not hard to follow.\"\nJhace felt the heat surge in his chest. Not manifestation. Fear.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 13231
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 13408,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    454,
                    459
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Velocity-Heights was three Tides' travel from the Dregs—higher elevation, newer construction, architecture that actually functioned instead of improvising survival.\nCorlexi went alone. Cover story: merchant verification. Real purpose: understand opposition.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 13377
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 13650,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    29,
                    36
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The cot was empty.\nTiffani stood in the doorway with her slate balanced on her forearm, chalk already lifted to record Jhace's breathing rate, tremor amplitude, pupil response. The measurements she'd planned for three Tides. The documentation that would establish baseline for Stage Four progression.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 13621
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 13767,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    112,
                    117
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Message from Salee. Says you're documenting the Dregs.\"\nHis cover held steady. \"I'm a merchant. Documentation helps business.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 13736
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 13887,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    173,
                    181
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"The director is calling it a documentation error. Lost ledger pages. Misclassified incidents. Officially, your search access is being revoked as of the next Tide.\" He paused. \"Someone doesn't want you following this trail.\"\nTiffani opened the folder. The eighth incident report confirmed her vector. Grindheim Dregs—old textile district. Same signature. Same impossibility.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 13856
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14038,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    242,
                    245
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Paralysis. The infirmary cot. Unable to speak, to move, to do anything but breathe and watch. A figure entering—shadowless, moving in light that fell wrong. The burn in his palm. The light threading through him, mapping every nerve, every bone, every vessel.\nHe didn't remember the figure's face. Didn't remember why.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14007
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14171,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    295,
                    303
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Corlexi could have helped. A subtle Form adjustment—straighten the stress vectors, reduce the load, give her margin. No one would see. No one would know. His intervention would be invisible, perfect, undetectable.\nBut intervention would require revealing his competence. Would require proving he could do something no normal manifestor could do. Would risk exposure of his anomaly.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14140
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14286,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    372,
                    385
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"You can. But it requires terms.\" Salee's hands stilled. This was business now. \"You get my network's routing. You get access to witnesses. You get safe passage—no one will disappear you or kill you, because my people are invested in your success.\"\n\"What do you require?\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14255
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14414,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    433,
                    441
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The shard pulsed harder when Jhace examined the holds. Heat bloomed in his chest like coals being fanned. His vision shimmer at the edges—copper-gold light flickering across his sight.\nThe manifestation drive surged. He needed to hold something. The stress points were right there, screaming, demanding attention. A cracked beam in the tavern. A failing joint in the dock extension. Fractures propagating through the stone quay.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14383
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14551,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    500,
                    504
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "That night, he delayed filing three incident reports. Altered two sets of notes to obscure a pattern he'd identified. Took a small risk: documented a manifestor who wasn't in his registry yet, as contingency.\nEntropy. The slow breakdown of perfect order.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14520
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14678,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    521,
                    526
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"The methodology doesn't account for hiding.\" Tiffani's voice was flat. Controlled. \"Physics doesn't hide. Residue doesn't hide. Band-spike signatures don't—\"\n\"But people do.\" Bram's humor was gone. Just tired honesty. \"Jhace knows how you think. Knows how you track. If he doesn't want to be found...\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14647
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14805,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    598,
                    606
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Because Mobel described the same thing. Before he stopped talking.\" She stood. \"You're being hunted. Someone's tracking you the same way you're tracking Mobel. I don't know who. But the trail you're leaving—the holds, the residue, the band-spike patterns—they're not hard to follow.\"\nJhace felt the heat surge in his chest. Not manifestation. Fear.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14774
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 14930,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                  "cited_message_idx": 67,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    1,
                    9
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
                "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Someone had entered through the window. Had crossed to the charts. Had touched the surface of his desk. Had left something behind.\nHe found it under his pillow. A single copper-stained chalk piece. The kind manifestors used for resonance mapping.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 14903
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 15079,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                  "cited_message_idx": 67,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    21,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 2,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 2
                },
                "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
                "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Two Tides behind, maybe less now. Getting closer.\nThree-way chase. Jhace pursuing Mobel. Unknown pursuer tracking Jhace. Mobel running from everyone and everything.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 15050
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 15325,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    51,
                    55
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Tiffani's hand stilled on the slate. \"Then he's documented as still admitted?\"\n\"That's the problem. Someone removed the admission ledger page.\" The clerk swallowed. \"The director is... unclear about protocol now.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 15296
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 15357,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    173,
                    181
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"The director is calling it a documentation error. Lost ledger pages. Misclassified incidents. Officially, your search access is being revoked as of the next Tide.\" He paused. \"Someone doesn't want you following this trail.\"\nTiffani opened the folder. The eighth incident report confirmed her vector. Grindheim Dregs—old textile district. Same signature. Same impossibility.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 15326
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 15477,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    226,
                    234
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Jhace lay still and tested systematically. Right hand: functional, delay of three heartbeats between intention and response. Left hand: same. Toes: responsive with phase lag. He could feel his legs—actual sensation, not the memory of sensation that had been all he'd had for Tides.\nThe tremor was gone.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 15446
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 15601,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    598,
                    606
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Because Mobel described the same thing. Before he stopped talking.\" She stood. \"You're being hunted. Someone's tracking you the same way you're tracking Mobel. I don't know who. But the trail you're leaving—the holds, the residue, the band-spike patterns—they're not hard to follow.\"\nJhace felt the heat surge in his chest. Not manifestation. Fear.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 15570
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 16123,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    205,
                    212
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Her hand shook as she drew the final line.\nCopper flooded her mouth. Her right knee locked, then unlocked, then refused to cooperate entirely for six heartbeats.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 16092
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 16351,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    525,
                    533
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"Then he chose departure.\" Tiffani wrote it down, and her hand shook so badly the chalk broke. \"He chose concealment. From me specifically.\"\nShe'd missed something. Some variable. Some data point that would have shown why the trail went cold instead of just that it did.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 16320
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 16587,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    572,
                    574
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The shard pulsed hard enough that Jhace's vision blurred at the edges. The heat behind his sternum was constant now—not flaring anymore, just present, like he was carrying coals inside his chest.\nHe sat on a broken pier and forced his breathing to slow. Counted his heartbeats. The phase lag in his body was worse today—orders arriving later, movements landing at odd intervals. Walking felt like operating a puppet of himself. And his left hand was changing: the copper-gold glow had spread past his wrist, creeping up his forearm, and the skin underneath felt wrong. Hot. Tight. Like something was trying to break through from inside.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 16556
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 16616,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                  "cited_message_idx": 67,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    9,
                    12
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 2,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 2
                },
                "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
                "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "He looked at his left hand. The copper-gold glow had spread to his elbow. The skin underneath was pale, almost translucent, like something was happening at a level his eyes couldn't quite focus on.\n*Cost mutation visible. Spread rate: \\~handspan per Tide. Termination threshold: unknown. This is not what I chose.*",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 16588
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 16860,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    476,
                    493
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "\"My writing suggests structure is temporary.\" She sat on a stone bench, leaving space for him. He didn't sit. \"Everything decays. Everything fails. Control doesn't prevent that—it just chooses which failures you don't see coming.\"\n\"Order prevents chaos.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 16829
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 17002,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    4,
                    11
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "TIMEKEEPING LOCK (Applied Globally)\nFormat adopted: Anneal X, Tide Y (shorthand: AX-TY)",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 16974
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 17121,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    12,
                    15
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "LEXICON SWAP (Global)\n\"doubled harmonic\" → \"dual-band resonance\" or \"second-mode bleed\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 17092
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 17249,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    124,
                    129
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "He focused on the crooked lamp bracket across the room. Felt the structure of it—iron, stress point at the joint, tolerance for load. Then he adjusted. The bracket straightened with a soft click.\nForm. The principle of structure maintained. His mastery was subtle but absolute. And it cost him nothing.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 17218
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 17372,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                  "cited_message_idx": 70,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    543,
                    552
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": null
                },
                "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Bram looked at her. Really looked. \"You're not okay.\"\n\"Define okay.\"",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 17341
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 17484,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                  "cited_message_idx": 67,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    21,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 2,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 2
                },
                "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
                "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Two Tides behind, maybe less now. Getting closer.\nThree-way chase. Jhace pursuing Mobel. Unknown pursuer tracking Jhace. Mobel running from everyone and everything.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 17455
            }
          ],

              "snippet": "N01 ended: A4-T21\nN02 starts: A5-T2 (1-2 Tides later)",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1155,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1332,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 14,
                "line_range_start": 12,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L12-L14",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "LEXICON SWAP (Global)\n\"doubled harmonic\" → \"dual-band resonance\" or \"second-mode bleed\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1303,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1422,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 15,
                "line_range_start": 13,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L13-L15",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"doubled harmonic\" → \"dual-band resonance\" or \"second-mode bleed\"\n\"harmonic spikes\" → \"band-spike\" or \"mode surge\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1393,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1525,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 16,
                "line_range_start": 14,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L14-L16",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"harmonic spikes\" → \"band-spike\" or \"mode surge\"\n\"baseline\" (kept; safe) → \"reference hum\" where contextually stronger",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1496,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1764,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 23,
                "line_range_start": 20,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L20-L23",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Cost Progression Stages:\nStage One: Tremor visible post-hold, recovers within one Anneal",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1735,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1873,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 24,
                "line_range_start": 22,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L22-L24",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Stage One: Tremor visible post-hold, recovers within one Anneal\nStage Two: Tremor persistent, vein-lines creeping, exhaustion accumulates",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1844,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1992,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 25,
                "line_range_start": 23,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L23-L25",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Stage Two: Tremor persistent, vein-lines creeping, exhaustion accumulates\nStage Three: Vein-lines widespread, tremor worsens daily, paralysis-risk visible",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1963,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 2117,
              "fff_metadata": null,
