Who's dying.\" Salee leaned back. \"You measure infrastructure. I measure community. Teach me your measurement, and I'll show you where Jhace went.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 11310,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 11490,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 552,
                "line_range_start": 543,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L543-L552",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Bram looked at her. Really looked. \"You're not okay.\"\n\"Define okay.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 11459,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 11735,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 606,
                "line_range_start": 592,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L592-L606",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"He manifests without cost. I need to understand how.\"\n\"Cost doesn't disappear.\" Vael touched the shard-tool at her belt—external integration instead of internal. She'd built her own coupling. \"It relocates. Changes form. Accumulates somewhere you're not looking.\" She met his eyes. \"Your shard has been drawing you toward structural stress. Yes?\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 11704,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 11953,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 493,
                "line_range_start": 472,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L472-L493",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"You want to know if I'm a threat. I'm not. I don't manifest. I don't organize. I think, and occasionally I write, and that's all.\"\n\"Your writing suggests structure is an illusion.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 11922,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 12156,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 185,
                "line_range_start": 173,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L173-L185",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"The director is calling it a documentation error. Lost ledger pages. Misclassified incidents. Officially, your search access is being revoked as of the next Tide.\" He paused. \"Someone doesn't want you following this trail.\"\nTiffani opened the folder. The eighth incident report confirmed her vector. Grindheim Dregs—old textile district. Same signature. Same impossibility.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 12125,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 12299,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 23,
                "line_range_start": 19,
                "message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file0L19-L23",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"You won't find them.\" Vael sat on the pier beside him, leaving space between. \"Mobel's been running for three Anneals. Whatever answers he has, he's not sharing.\"\n\"He manifests without cost. I need to understand how.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 12270,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 12593,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 41,
                "line_range_start": 37,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L37-L41",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "She stepped into the room. Counted objects. Cup on the side table, positioned at arm's length from where his shoulder would have been. He couldn't have reached it. The calibration strap was gone. So was his secondary slate and three pieces of copper-stained chalk—the specific ones he used for resonance mapping.\nHis main measurement slate remained. The heavy one. The one that mattered.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 12564,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 12623,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 86,
                "line_range_start": 81,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L81-L86",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "She began inventory. Every surface. Every angle. The ash bin near the cold stove held half-burned paper, and she fished through it with two fingers until she found a scrap with readable text:\n...locked maintenance corridor...requires two hands + walking...impossible...",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 12594,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 12743,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 77,
                "line_range_start": 75,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L75-L77",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "She closed the door and stood alone in the room where a paralyzed man had apparently walked away. The grid-hum was different here—dual-band resonance that had settled into the walls since the Piercing. The second-mode bleed felt lower, deeper. She could taste copper at the back of her throat, stronger than yesterday. Her own hand shook slightly as she wrote.\nShe didn't log the tremor.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 12714,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 12916,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 377,
                "line_range_start": 368,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L368-L377",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"I know about the incidents that followed him. Seven holds that shouldn't have worked. Eight, now. Nine, if we count this morning's stabilization at the southern warehouse.\" Salee leaned forward. \"The trail points here, then stops. Because the Dregs don't hold trails the way stone does. People flow. Information flows. Your methodology isn't built for this.\"\n\"Then I'll adapt it.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 12885,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 13057,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 337,
                "line_range_start": 330,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L330-L337",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Grindheim's Dregs were nothing like Saint Merro.\nThe infrastructure here had failed decades before the Piercing—not from resonance stress but from neglect, from the slow death of the textile industry that had built these streets. What remained was improvisation. Bridges made of salvaged beams. Buildings shored with whatever materials were at hand. Walls that leaned into each other for support because standing alone wasn't possible.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 13026,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 13230,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 413,
                "line_range_start": 405,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L405-L413",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "The coastal route smelled of salt and rotting kelp. Jhace walked it alone, shard pulsing warm in his palm, body finding rhythm despite the phase lag.\nMobel's trail was fresh here.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 13199,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 13262,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 606,
                "line_range_start": 598,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L598-L606",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"Because Mobel described the same thing. Before he stopped talking.\" She stood. \"You're being hunted. Someone's tracking you the same way you're tracking Mobel. I don't know who. But the trail you're leaving—the holds, the residue, the band-spike patterns—they're not hard to follow.\"\nJhace felt the heat surge in his chest. Not manifestation. Fear.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 13231,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 13408,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 459,
                "line_range_start": 454,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L454-L459",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Velocity-Heights was three Tides' travel from the Dregs—higher elevation, newer construction, architecture that actually functioned instead of improvising survival.\nCorlexi went alone. Cover story: merchant verification. Real purpose: understand opposition.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 13377,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 13650,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 36,
                "line_range_start": 29,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L29-L36",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "The cot was empty.\nTiffani stood in the doorway with her slate balanced on her forearm, chalk already lifted to record Jhace's breathing rate, tremor amplitude, pupil response. The measurements she'd planned for three Tides. The documentation that would establish baseline for Stage Four progression.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 13621,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 13767,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 117,
                "line_range_start": 112,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L112-L117",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"Message from Salee. Says you're documenting the Dregs.\"\nHis cover held steady. \"I'm a merchant. Documentation helps business.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 13736,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 13887,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 181,
                "line_range_start": 173,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L173-L181",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"The director is calling it a documentation error. Lost ledger pages. Misclassified incidents. Officially, your search access is being revoked as of the next Tide.\" He paused. \"Someone doesn't want you following this trail.\"\nTiffani opened the folder. The eighth incident report confirmed her vector. Grindheim Dregs—old textile district. Same signature. Same impossibility.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 13856,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14038,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 245,
                "line_range_start": 242,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L242-L245",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Paralysis. The infirmary cot. Unable to speak, to move, to do anything but breathe and watch. A figure entering—shadowless, moving in light that fell wrong. The burn in his palm. The light threading through him, mapping every nerve, every bone, every vessel.\nHe didn't remember the figure's face. Didn't remember why.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14007,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14171,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 303,
                "line_range_start": 295,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L295-L303",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Corlexi could have helped. A subtle Form adjustment—straighten the stress vectors, reduce the load, give her margin. No one would see. No one would know. His intervention would be invisible, perfect, undetectable.\nBut intervention would require revealing his competence. Would require proving he could do something no normal manifestor could do. Would risk exposure of his anomaly.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14140,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14286,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 385,
                "line_range_start": 372,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L372-L385",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"You can. But it requires terms.\" Salee's hands stilled. This was business now. \"You get my network's routing. You get access to witnesses. You get safe passage—no one will disappear you or kill you, because my people are invested in your success.\"\n\"What do you require?\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14255,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14414,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 441,
                "line_range_start": 433,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L433-L441",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "The shard pulsed harder when Jhace examined the holds. Heat bloomed in his chest like coals being fanned. His vision shimmer at the edges—copper-gold light flickering across his sight.\nThe manifestation drive surged. He needed to hold something. The stress points were right there, screaming, demanding attention. A cracked beam in the tavern. A failing joint in the dock extension. Fractures propagating through the stone quay.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14383,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14551,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 504,
                "line_range_start": 500,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L500-L504",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "That night, he delayed filing three incident reports. Altered two sets of notes to obscure a pattern he'd identified. Took a small risk: documented a manifestor who wasn't in his registry yet, as contingency.\nEntropy. The slow breakdown of perfect order.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14520,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14678,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 526,
                "line_range_start": 521,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L521-L526",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"The methodology doesn't account for hiding.\" Tiffani's voice was flat. Controlled. \"Physics doesn't hide. Residue doesn't hide. Band-spike signatures don't—\"\n\"But people do.\" Bram's humor was gone. Just tired honesty. \"Jhace knows how you think. Knows how you track. If he doesn't want to be found...\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14647,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14805,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 606,
                "line_range_start": 598,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L598-L606",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"Because Mobel described the same thing. Before he stopped talking.\" She stood. \"You're being hunted. Someone's tracking you the same way you're tracking Mobel. I don't know who. But the trail you're leaving—the holds, the residue, the band-spike patterns—they're not hard to follow.\"\nJhace felt the heat surge in his chest. Not manifestation. Fear.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14774,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 14930,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 4,
                "line_range_end": 9,
                "line_range_start": 1,
                "message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file4L1-L9",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
              "snippet": "Someone had entered through the window. Had crossed to the charts. Had touched the surface of his desk. Had left something behind.\nHe found it under his pillow. A single copper-stained chalk piece. The kind manifestors used for resonance mapping.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 14903,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 15079,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 2,
                "line_range_end": 24,
                "line_range_start": 21,
                "message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file2L21-L24",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
              "snippet": "Two Tides behind, maybe less now. Getting closer.\nThree-way chase. Jhace pursuing Mobel. Unknown pursuer tracking Jhace. Mobel running from everyone and everything.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 15050,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 15325,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 55,
                "line_range_start": 51,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L51-L55",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Tiffani's hand stilled on the slate. \"Then he's documented as still admitted?\"\n\"That's the problem. Someone removed the admission ledger page.\" The clerk swallowed. \"The director is... unclear about protocol now.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 15296,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 15357,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 181,
                "line_range_start": 173,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L173-L181",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"The director is calling it a documentation error. Lost ledger pages. Misclassified incidents. Officially, your search access is being revoked as of the next Tide.\" He paused. \"Someone doesn't want you following this trail.\"\nTiffani opened the folder. The eighth incident report confirmed her vector. Grindheim Dregs—old textile district. Same signature. Same impossibility.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 15326,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 15477,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 234,
                "line_range_start": 226,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L226-L234",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Jhace lay still and tested systematically. Right hand: functional, delay of three heartbeats between intention and response. Left hand: same. Toes: responsive with phase lag. He could feel his legs—actual sensation, not the memory of sensation that had been all he'd had for Tides.\nThe tremor was gone.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 15446,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 15601,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 606,
                "line_range_start": 598,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L598-L606",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"Because Mobel described the same thing. Before he stopped talking.\" She stood. \"You're being hunted. Someone's tracking you the same way you're tracking Mobel. I don't know who. But the trail you're leaving—the holds, the residue, the band-spike patterns—they're not hard to follow.\"\nJhace felt the heat surge in his chest. Not manifestation. Fear.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 15570,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 16123,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 212,
                "line_range_start": 205,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L205-L212",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Her hand shook as she drew the final line.\nCopper flooded her mouth. Her right knee locked, then unlocked, then refused to cooperate entirely for six heartbeats.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 16092,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 16351,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 533,
                "line_range_start": 525,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L525-L533",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"Then he chose departure.\" Tiffani wrote it down, and her hand shook so badly the chalk broke. \"He chose concealment. From me specifically.\"\nShe'd missed something. Some variable. Some data point that would have shown why the trail went cold instead of just that it did.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 16320,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 16587,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 574,
                "line_range_start": 572,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L572-L574",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "The shard pulsed hard enough that Jhace's vision blurred at the edges. The heat behind his sternum was constant now—not flaring anymore, just present, like he was carrying coals inside his chest.\nHe sat on a broken pier and forced his breathing to slow. Counted his heartbeats. The phase lag in his body was worse today—orders arriving later, movements landing at odd intervals. Walking felt like operating a puppet of himself. And his left hand was changing: the copper-gold glow had spread past his wrist, creeping up his forearm, and the skin underneath felt wrong. Hot. Tight. Like something was trying to break through from inside.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 16556,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 16616,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_00000000be0471f8be6b30e111ea6ee7",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 2,
                "line_range_end": 12,
                "line_range_start": 9,
                "message_id": "b7f3abaa-13b5-450f-903a-0edae8516c93",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file2L9-L12",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
              "snippet": "He looked at his left hand. The copper-gold glow had spread to his elbow. The skin underneath was pale, almost translucent, like something was happening at a level his eyes couldn't quite focus on.\n*Cost mutation visible. Spread rate: \\~handspan per Tide. Termination threshold: unknown. This is not what I chose.*",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 16588,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 16860,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 493,
                "line_range_start": 476,
                "message_id": "7d2d851f-d7c8-4ba7-b0af-b8039bc5a676",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L476-L493",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "\"My writing suggests structure is temporary.\" She sat on a stone bench, leaving space for him. He didn't sit. \"Everything decays. Everything fails. Control doesn't prevent that—it just chooses which failures you don't see coming.\"\n\"Order prevents chaos.\"",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 16829,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 17002,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_000000007f2871f8b97dd923e8e90b92",
              "input_pointer": {

              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "He focused on the crooked lamp bracket across the room. Felt the structure of it—iron, stress point at the joint, tolerance for load. Then he adjusted. The bracket straightened with a soft click.\nForm. The principle of structure maintained. His mastery was subtle but absolute. And it cost him nothing.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 17218,
              "type": "file"
            },

              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file0L543-L552",

                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,

              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "Bram looked at her. Really looked. \"You're not okay.\"\n\"Define okay.\"",

              "name": "N02_ LIGHT CRACKS THROUGH (1).md",
              "snippet": "Two Tides behind, maybe less now. Getting closer.\nThree-way chase. Jhace pursuing Mobel. Unknown pursuer tracking Jhace. Mobel running from everyone and everything.",

    "64547094-6b77-4746-ba18-3e63108d99df": {
      "children": [
        "b2f8b47c-037b-47a6-8246-bec83a8296a8"
      ],

        "author": {
          "metadata": {},
          "name": "python",
          "role": "tool"
        },
        "channel": null,
        "content": {
          "content_type": "execution_output",
          "text": "2 ## CHAPTER 2: FORM\\n\\n*(POV: Corlexi) | A5-T2*\\n\\nCorlexi’s workspace served two lives.\\n\\nOn the table: grain tallies, transport costs, dull merchant arguments that made a man forget he was being watched.\\n\\nOn the walls—when uncovered—incident maps, cost progression curves, termination thresholds, name lists compiled without consent because consent slowed control.\\n\\nA knock came at the wrong rhythm.\\n\\nHe \n---\n\n3 ## CHAPTER 3: WAKE\\n\\n*(POV: Tiffani Merrow) | A5-T3 through A5-T7*\\n\\nSeven reports. Seven incidents. Three Tides.\\n\\nTiffani laid them across her workspace and refused long blinks. Patterns showed themselves when you didn’t flinch.\\n\\nSeam collapse near Junction Twelve boundary. Estimated hold duration: two hundred heartbeats. Zero casualties where her structural projection demanded four minimum. Copper\n---\n\n4 ## CHAPTER 4: SEARCHING\\n\\n*(POV: Jhace Torrins) | A5-T3*\\n\\nHe woke expecting paralysis.\\n\\nHis fingers moved.\\n\\nJhace stayed still and ran the test the way he ran every inspection: smallest system first, then expand.\\n\\nRight hand: functional. Delay of three heartbeats between intention and motion.  \\nLeft hand: functional. Same delay.  \\nToes: responsive, but late—as if signals had been rerouted through b\n---\n\n5 ## CHAPTER 5: AUTHORITY\\n\\n*(POV: Corlexi) | A5-T3*\\n\\nIn the Dregs, news arrived as pressure before it arrived as words.\\n\\nCorlexi was recalculating a termination curve when the building’s vibration changed—low shove under the normal band. Stone transmitted it clean. Wood transmitted it late.\\n\\nA boy with a textile knot on his wrist arrived ten minutes after.\\n\\n“Saint Merro got struck,” the boy said.\\n\\n“\n---\n\n"
        },
        "create_time": 1767959258.8536947,
        "end_turn": null,
        "id": "64547094-6b77-4746-ba18-3e63108d99df",
        "metadata": {
          "aggregate_result": {
            "code": "import re\ndef get_chapter(n):\n    # capture from \"## CHAPTER n:\" until next \"## CHAPTER\"\n    pattern = rf\"## CHAPTER {n}:[\\s\\S]*?(?=\\n## CHAPTER {n+1}:|\\Z)\"\n    m = re.search(pattern, text)\n    return m.group(0) if m else None\nfor n in range(2,6):\n    ch = get_chapter(n)\n    print(n, ch[:400].replace(\"\\n\",\"\\\\n\")+\"\\n---\\n\")\n",
            "end_time": 1767959260.834616,
            "final_expression_output": null,
            "in_kernel_exception": null,

    "67cc9a18-5cdc-4b29-92c9-62d6a7d9de78": {
      "children": [
        "1977782d-9d86-4e53-b6c9-4fe2473219ca"
      ],
      "id": "67cc9a18-5cdc-4b29-92c9-62d6a7d9de78",
      "message": {
        "author": {
          "metadata": {},
          "name": null,
          "role": "assistant"
        },
        "channel": null,
        "content": {
          "content_type": "code",
          "language": "unknown",
          "response_format_name": null,
          "text": "add3_a = \"\"\"\n\nShe didn’t trust a line just because it looked neat.\n\nShe checked angles twice. Measured the distances against street scale and remembered that Guild maps lied by omission—collapsed alleys weren’t removed, just unlabeled until someone important complained.\n\nEach report got its own verification pass. Ink density. Stamp pressure. The way a clerk’s hand hesitated before writing “zero casualties,” as if the page itself might argue.\n\nOne report had been rewritten over an earlier number. The original casualty estimate still ghosted through the paper if she held it against the lamp.\n\nAuthority edited outcomes after the fact.\n\nShe logged that privately and kept the main slate clean.\n\nWhen she was done, the map wasn’t a story. It was a constraint: every clean hold sat on the same implied path, as if someone were moving with purpose rather than responding to random collapse.\n\"\"\"\n\nadd3_b = \"\"\"\n\nCorran’s eyes flicked once to the corner of the room where the corridor cameras couldn’t see. A habit from working under people who punished habits.\n\n“They didn’t just revoke you,” he said. “They gave your authorizations a replacement. Crown co-mark. Relief routing. Stabilization protocol. Every inquiry now routes through a table with guards standing over it.”\n\nHe swallowed and forced the words out in one run, like ripping a bandage.\n\n“They’re using the Brinehammer as justification to consolidate paperwork. Which means they consolidate bodies. Which means the minute you ask a question, you get added to a list.”\n\nTiffani’s chalk moved once, then stopped. She didn’t look at him.\n\n“Your name is already known,” Corran added. “Not as a person. As a tool.”\n\nTools got assigned.\n\nTools got taken.\n\"\"\"\n\nadd3_c = \"\"\"\n\nBram didn’t argue after that. He shifted into his other competency—the one he hated admitting he had.\n\nHe traced his finger along the map and named routes the Guild didn’t list. Textile lanes. Harbor cut-throughs. Places where a pass meant less than a familiar face.\n\n“My aunt runs a remnants wagon,” he said. “Grindheim gets cloth whether the Crown likes it or not. The escort pass will be in my name. You’ll be my ‘inventory assessor.’”\n\n“That’s not a role,” Tiffani said.\n\n“It’s a lie that sounds boring,” Bram replied. “Boring gets waved through.”\n\nTiffani copied the eight reports by hand anyway. Ink duplicated. Margins coded. The kind of redundancy that made burning a page insufficient.\n\nShe placed the duplicates in three different locations: inside her kit’s false bottom, inside Bram’s rolled cloth, and inside a seam of her coat where only a tailor would look.\n\nThen she snapped the kit closed.\n\nTomorrow wasn’t a plan.\n\nTomorrow was a timing window.\n\"\"\"\n\nch3_new = ch3\nch3_new = insert_after(ch3_new, \"The geometry held.\", add3_a)\nch3_new = insert_after(ch3_new, \"Administrative channel. Crown-level reach.\", add3_b)\nch3_new = insert_after(ch3_new, \"Accepted.\", add3_c)\n\nwc(ch3), wc(ch3_new)\n"
        },
        "create_time": 1767959831.111326,
        "end_turn": false,

    "71adf658-1a6f-4549-8d64-0ab98102648b": {
      "children": [
        "caba5c14-efaa-417a-819e-199644b2094e"
      ],
      "id": "71adf658-1a6f-4549-8d64-0ab98102648b",
      "message": {
        "author": {
          "metadata": {},
          "name": "python",
          "role": "tool"
        },
        "channel": null,
        "content": {
          "content_type": "execution_output",
          "text": "CH 7 len 2160 wc 344\n## CHAPTER 7: TRACKING\n\n*(POV: Jhace Torrins) | A5-T6*\n\nThe coast smelled wrong—brine, rot, and silt that belonged under stone, not on top of it.\n\nJhace walked north with his kit tight against his ribs. Phase lag made every step arrive late. He corrected by counting and refusing to rush.\n\nMobel’s wake stayed readable: dock pilings braced too clean, warehouse walls stabilized mid-fail with residue concentrated at joints, stone stairs corrected without the scuff patterns tremoring hands left behind.\n\nThe Brinehammer made stress points everywhere.\n\nThat made the shard behind his sternum restless.\n\nHe refused three holds before noon and paid for refusal anyway. Heat built. Phase lag worsened. His hands stayed steady while the rest of him felt less aligned.\n\nAt a coastal settlement, a pier cran\n---\n\nCH 9 len 1797 wc 280\n## CHAPTER 9: COLD\n\n*(POV: Tiffani Merrow) | A5-T8*\n\nThe Dregs didn’t keep trails the way stone kept scuffs.\n\nSalee’s network gave Tiffani what it could: three sightings in two Tides. A man moving wrong—step landing late, body correcting after. Hands steady when they shouldn’t be. A copper-gold glow glimpsed at a sleeve edge. Always northeast.\n\nTiffani mapped each point and watched the geometry degrade.\n\nNot because the pattern was false.\n\nBecause the pattern stopped being physical.\n\nIt became behavior.\n\nAt the Dregs edge, reliable sighting dissolved into “maybe” and “don’t ask again.”\n\nBram stood beside her under a bent awning. “He’s not here.”\n\n“The data doesn’t support that.”\n\n“The data doesn’t support anything,” Bram snapped, then softened. “People survive by lying here.”\n\nSalee approa\n---\n\nCH 10 len 2282 wc 367\n## CHAPTER 10: INTERSECTION\n\n*(POV: Jhace Torrins) | A5-T9*\n\nThe settlement had a lighthouse stump and a main street lined with broken glass left by the Brinehammer’s edge.\n\nJhace arrived and felt stress before he saw it: a warehouse frame pulled out of square, wet weight in the roof, one support joint already eating itself under shifting load.\n\nThe shard tightened.\n\nHe told it no.\n\nIt surged anyway.\n\nLight pressed outward through him and into stone. The frame settled. The joint locked long enough for people inside to get out.\n\nJhace cut coupling and took one step wrong as phase lag hit.\n\nHeat slammed his ribs. Copper flooded his mouth. Blood smeared thin on his wrist when he wiped. He didn’t stop to inspect it. Stopping made you catchable.\n\n“You’re the other one.”\n\nJhace turned.\n\nA woman \n---\n\n"
        },
        "create_time": 1767959410.2550275,
        "end_turn": null,
        "id": "71adf658-1a6f-4549-8d64-0ab98102648b",
        "metadata": {
          "aggregate_result": {
            "code": "def chapter(n):\n    patt = rf\"(## CHAPTER {n}:[\\s\\S]*?)(?=\\n## CHAPTER {n+1}:|\\Z)\"\n    m = re.search(patt, text)\n    return m.group(1) if m else \"\"\nfor n in [7,9,10]:\n    ch = chapter(n)\n    print(\"CH\", n, \"len\", len(ch), \"wc\", len(re.findall(r'\\b[\\w’\\'-]+\\b', ch)))\n    print(ch[:800])\n    print(\"---\\n\")\n",
            "end_time": 1767959412.831847,
            "final_expression_output": null,
            "in_kernel_exception": null,

    "77fcd330-54d9-426d-8fa8-f2b8d717faae": {
      "children": [
        "f72a6af4-4272-413e-be4a-0cf94ebd8413"
      ],
      "id": "77fcd330-54d9-426d-8fa8-f2b8d717faae",
      "message": {
        "author": {
          "metadata": {},
          "name": null,
          "role": "assistant"
        },
        "channel": "final",
        "content": {
          "content_type": "text",
          "parts": [
            "I read the uploaded patch file. fileciteturn1file0L1-L16\n\n## What you fixed (good)\n- **Lexicon swap is now explicitly locked** (“doubled harmonic” → “dual-band resonance/second-mode bleed”, etc.). fileciteturn1file0L12-L16  \n- **Stage ladder anchor is finally pinned** (Stage 1–4 definitions). fileciteturn1file0L17-L25  \n- **Institutional obstruction is dramatized** (missing ledger page / director panic) instead of implied. fileciteturn1file0L43-L56  \n- **Shard removal got patched out** (your final status claims “Form read via environment” instead). fileciteturn1file1L60-L62  \n- **Salee “she sees you” pressure is now on-page in Corlexi’s thread**, which helps keep his cover “strained.” fileciteturn1file2L10-L19  \n\n## The big problem: your “Timekeeping lock” is still self-contradicting\nYou currently state all three of these:\n1) **Tide is continuous day-count** fileciteturn1file0L7-L8  \n2) **Anneal is 5 Tides** fileciteturn1file0L7-L8  \n3) **N01 ended A4-T21 and N02 starts A5-T2** fileciteturn1file0L9-L11  \n\nThose cannot all be true at the same time.\n\nIf Tide is *continuous* and Anneal is *5 Tides*, then **Tide 21 is in Anneal 5**, not Anneal 4. So “A4-T21” breaks your own math.\n\n### Pick one of these two clean systems and enforce it everywhere\n\n**System A (recommended): Tide is continuous; Anneal is derived label**  \n- Write dates like: **“Tide 22 (Anneal 5)”** or shorthand **T22/A5**.  \n- Never write **A5-T2**, because “T2” implies a within-Anneal index.\n\n**System B: Tide resets inside each Anneal (1–5); no absolute Tide numbers in prose**  \n- Write: **Anneal 5, Tide 2** (and stop using “Tide 19 / Tide 21” style numbers entirely).\n\nRight now you’re mixing A and B, which will wreck continuity later.\n\n## One more thing to verify (don’t assume it’s clean)\nYou *declared* the lexicon swap, but you still need a hard check for any lingering banned words across the full text:\n- Search for: **harmon**, **melod**, **song**, **hymn**, **chorus**, etc.  \nYour swap block is correct, but a single stray “harmonic” later will slip through unless you actually run the find. fileciteturn1file0L12-L16  \n\n## Minor production notes worth fixing (fast)\n- Grammar glitch: “His vision shimmer” → “His vision **shimmered**.” fileciteturn1file3L40-L41  \n- Your “FINAL STATUS” claims ~15,200 words. Treat that as a placeholder unless you actually word-counted the full manuscript text. fileciteturn1file1L51-L53  \n\n## If you want the fastest “lock-tight” patch\nRewrite ONLY the **TIMEKEEPING LOCK** section so it is mathematically consistent with the date tags you’re using, then do a global banned-word search. Everything else is already moving in the right direction. fileciteturn1file0L4-L16"
          ]
        },

        "end_turn": true,

                "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "A knock came at the door—unexpected. He swept the charts under a merchant's inventory ledger and straightened.\nAn older woman stood in the threshold, hands callused, eyes sharp.",

              "name": "N02 PRODUCTION HEADER.txt",
              "snippet": "A knock came at the door—unexpected. He swept the charts under a merchant's inventory ledger and straightened.\nAn older woman stood in the threshold, hands callused, eyes sharp.",

    "7b170eea-9469-45ff-a92b-5c988663220c": {
      "children": [
        "afe899f6-ae4d-4c19-b838-f762228623c2"
      ],
      "id": "7b170eea-9469-45ff-a92b-5c988663220c",
      "message": {
        "author": {
          "metadata": {},
          "name": "python",
          "role": "tool"
        },
        "channel": null,
        "content": {
          "content_type": "execution_output",
          "text": "(826, 1308)"
        },
        "create_time": 1767959678.7704012,
        "end_turn": null,
        "id": "7b170eea-9469-45ff-a92b-5c988663220c",
        "metadata": {
          "aggregate_result": {
            "code": "# Build expansions\nadd2_a = \"\"\"\n\nCorlexi held the handle of the door for one extra heartbeat after it latched, not out of hesitation—out of measurement.\n\nSalee didn’t waste a runner on courtesies. If she spent breath to tell him *she sees you*, it meant she wanted his next movement to be conscious.\n\nHe counted the room again. Table legs. Chair placement. The angle of the lamp bracket he’d just corrected. The thin dust line along the window sill that would show if someone listened from outside.\n\nNothing obvious.\n\nThat was the point.\n\nHe rebuttoned his shirt slowly. Not to hide the scars—anyone who would search him would find them anyway—but to force his posture back into the merchant shape. An embedded man survived by being boring.\n\nOutside, the district vibration kept changing. Not a single strike, like the Brinehammer—this was continuous load. Footfalls. Door slams. Wet bundles dragged over stone. People arriving in waves and pretending it was a trickle.\n\nHe could feel the building disagree.\n\nStone columns took weight clean. The wood beams above them took it with a delay that read like reluctance.\n\nHe wrote, on the back of a shipping sheet where numbers were allowed to look ugly:\n\n*Observation: network contact confirmed. Counter-observation probable. Maintain cover. Avoid clean interventions.*\n\nThen he crossed the room and put his palm against the main wall seam.\n\nForm gave him information if he listened the way the stone listened.\n\nNot names. Not motives.\n\nPressure lines. Micro-shifts. The beginning of failure before anyone screamed.\n\nThe seam told him the first floor was already being asked to do more than it had been built for.\n\"\"\"\n\nadd2_b = \"\"\"\n\nHe watched the people move after his comment, the way a man watches water decide its path.\n\nOne woman shifted her bundle to the stone base without looking like she was obeying. A boy dragged a stool away from mid-span and told himself he’d had the idea first. Someone braced a door with a plank and pretended it was just “keeping drafts out.”\n\nSalee’s network did that. It made compliance feel like choice.\n\nA tall man near the stairwell—textile knot on his wrist—met Corlexi’s eyes for a fraction of a heartbeat and then looked away as if embarrassed by having *noticed*.\n\nCorlexi filed it: *network witness present.* Not hostile. Not friendly. Just aware.\n\nUpstairs, he rinsed his hands in a basin he didn’t need, because bodies did what minds could not confess.\n\nIn the rinse water, he saw copper dust cling to the skin at the cuticles—the residue that followed any precise hold, even one done without visible filaments. It wasn’t a cost marker. It was a trace marker.\n\nHe scrubbed harder than necessary until the water ran clear.\n\nThen he went back to his table and made a merchant’s face at the numbers, as if that was the only thing in the world that could ruin him.\n\"\"\"\n\n# Apply to chapter 2\nch2_new = ch2\nch2_new = insert_after(ch2_new, '“She wanted you to know she sees you.”', add2_a)\nch2_new = insert_after(ch2_new, 'People shifted. Load redistributed by human choice. That mattered. It gave his adjustment a mundane cause.', add2_b)\n\nwc(ch2), wc(ch2_new)\n",
            "end_time": 1767959681.9528375,
            "final_expression_output": "(826, 1308)",
            "in_kernel_exception": null,
            "jupyter_messages": [
